title: ballota pseudodictamnus subsp. lycia
intro: Ballota pseudodictamnus subsp. lycia, also known as Lycian Ballota, is a subspecies of plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is a type of herb that has been traditionally used in folk medicine, primarily due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lycian Ballota include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and reduce stress. Lycian Ballota can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various forms of consumption and usage.
